module.name: mobile_local_llm
module.description: Local Gemma 4 inference on capable mobile devices via an on-device OpenAI-compatible server (Android today, iOS stub pending LiteRT-LM model)
module.author: CIRIS Team

enabled.description: Master switch for the local inference adapter.

model_variant.description: Gemma 4 variant to run on-device (gemma-4-e2b or gemma-4-e4b).

model_path.description: Absolute path to the LiteRT-LM model bundle on disk.

ios_model_path.description: Expected path to the iOS Gemma 4 model bundle. When missing the adapter reports IOS_STUB so the wizard can show 'coming soon'.

server_binary.description: Absolute path to the local inference server binary. If unset the adapter attaches to a pre-running server.

host.description: Host the local inference server binds to (loopback by default).

port.description: Port the local inference server listens on.

ready_timeout_seconds.description: How long to wait for the server to become healthy after start().

min_total_ram_gb_e2b.description: Minimum total RAM (GB) required for the E2B tier.

min_free_disk_gb.description: Minimum free disk space (GB) required before local inference starts.

force_capability.description: Override the capability probe with 'capable_e2b', 'capable_e4b', 'ios_stub', or 'incapable'. Testing only.

allow_desktop.description: Allow the adapter to run on desktop platforms for development.

metadata.ios_status: stub - adapter detects capable iOS hardware but stays unavailable until an adequate Gemma 4 LiteRT-LM model is shipped via the iOS bundle
metadata.notes: Adapter owns the subprocess lifecycle of the inference server and reports unhealthy on weak devices so the LLM bus falls back to a hosted provider.
